Florida Estate Planning Portal

Your Legacy,
Built to Last.

Florida's most comprehensive attorney-guided estate planning experience. Answer a few questions — get a complete, court-ready document package in minutes. Wills, Trusts, Powers of Attorney, and more — all tailored to your family and reviewed by a Florida-licensed attorney.

Florida Land Trust
Hold real estate privately — your name never appears in public records. Avoids probate, preserves homestead. Ideal for investors & LLC structures.
F.S. § 689.071
$499
or $950 with Attorney
🔫
NFA / Gun Trust
Hold suppressors, SBRs, and other Title II items in a compliant trust. All responsible persons included. ATF Rule 41F compliant. Eliminates CLEO notification requirement.
ATF Rule 41F

How will you execute your documents?
🎥 After payment, book your secure video signing appointment below. Your Cornerstone Estate Planning Advisor will conduct the signing via our RON platform — witnesses and notarization included. Florida RON authorized under F.S. §§ 117.201–117.209.
